items.title: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
items.dek: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.
items.body: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sources: Doncic seeks custody petition dismissal
items.dek: Luka Dončić has filed documents seeking the dismissal of a petition filed by his ex-fiancée that is pursuing child support and attorney fees over the former cou
items.body: Luka Dončić has filed documents seeking the dismissal of a petition filed by his ex-fiancée that is pursuing child support and attorney fees over the former couple's child custody case, sources told ESPN's Dave McMenamin.
items.author: IriLine Desk
